The Craft

What makes Wolha different

01

No Sugar.
No Sweeteners.

Every note of sweetness in Wolha comes from the rice itself — slow-fermented, naturally rich. No additives, no shortcuts. Just the pure result of time and craft.

02

生 — Alive &
Unpasteurized

Wolha is never pasteurized. It remains alive with natural probiotics, preserving the living culture that defines authentic makgeolli. Keep it cold — it keeps its character.

03

Brewed with Pure
Canadian Water

Crafted in Port Coquitlam, BC, Wolha draws on pristine Canadian water — bridging centuries of Korean tradition with the terroir of British Columbia.

04

Handcrafted in
Small Batches

Every batch begins with 100% Korean sweet rice, washed and prepared by hand. Small-batch fermentation means every bottle carries intention — and no two batches are identical.

Available Now

How to Order

Ready to order?

✉
DM on Instagram
Message us directly at @wolha_ricewine. We respond promptly and are happy to help you choose.
☎
Call or Text
778-319-4113 — available for orders, questions, and bulk inquiries.
↗
Delivery · Metro Vancouver
Free delivery across Metro Vancouver. Minimum delivery order: 6 bottles (900 ml).
◎
Pick-Up · Port Coquitlam
#409–1485 Coast Meridian Rd, Port Coquitlam. By appointment only — please contact us before visiting.

Orders are fulfilled in 12-bottle cases (900 ml). Wolha is a living product — keep refrigerated and enjoy within the shelf life for the fullest experience.

We're a small-batch operation. Every order is handled with care — don't hesitate to reach out.
